Package space.sunqian.fs.object.schema

Interface MapSchemaParser

@ThreadSafe public interface MapSchemaParser
This interface is used to parse Type to MapSchema.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser
    defaultCachedParser()
    Returns the default cached MapSchemaParser, which is based on defaultParser() and caches the parsed results with a SimpleCache.ofSoft().
    static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser
    defaultParser()
    Returns the default MapSchemaParser.
    static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser
    newCachedParser(@Nonnull SimpleCache<@Nonnull Type,@Nonnull MapSchema> cache, @Nonnull MapSchemaParser parser)
    Returns a new MapSchemaParser that caches the parsed results with the specified cache.
    @Nonnull MapSchema
    parse(@Nonnull Type type)
    Parses the given Map type or MapType to an instance of MapSchemaParser, and returns the parsed MapSchemaParser.

  • Method Details

    • defaultParser

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser defaultParser()
      Returns the default MapSchemaParser.

      Note the default MapSchemaParser is singleton, and never caches the parsed results.

      Returns:
      the default MapSchemaParser

    • defaultCachedParser

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser defaultCachedParser()
      Returns the default cached MapSchemaParser, which is based on defaultParser() and caches the parsed results with a SimpleCache.ofSoft().

      Note the default cached MapSchemaParser is singleton.

      Returns:
      the default cached MapSchemaParser
      See Also:
      • defaultParser()

    • newCachedParser

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser newCachedParser(@Nonnull @Nonnull SimpleCache<@Nonnull Type,@Nonnull MapSchema> cache, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchemaParser parser)
      Returns a new MapSchemaParser that caches the parsed results with the specified cache.
      Parameters:
      cache - the specified cache to store the parsed results
      parser - the underlying MapSchemaParser to parse the type
      Returns:
      a new MapSchemaParser that caches the parsed results with the specified cache

    • parse

      @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema parse(@Nonnull @Nonnull Type type) throws DataSchemaException
      Parses the given Map type or MapType to an instance of MapSchemaParser, and returns the parsed MapSchemaParser.
      Parameters:
      type - the given type
      Returns:
      the parsed MapSchemaParser
      Throws:
      DataSchemaException - if the given type is not a Map type or MapType, or any other problem occurs
